summary: Deleted the temporary root-level target_funcs.txt checklist after its listed grAnime targets were completed. The file only referenced src/melee/gr/granime.c and eight checked-off functions. decomp.dev reported GALE01 had no changes, indicating this was repository bookkeeping with no code or binary impact.

key_files.notes: Removed a completed target-function checklist for src/melee/gr/granime.c.

what_changed: Deleted target_funcs.txt from the repository root.
Removed a checklist that pointed at src/melee/gr/granime.c.
Removed checked entries for grAnime_801C86D4, grAnime_801C84A4, grAnime_801C8578, grAnime_801C6A54, grAnime_801C752C, grAnime_801C6C0C, grAnime_801C7228, and grAnime_801C7C1C.
smart_moves: Cleaned up a temporary target tracking file once all listed functions were marked complete, reducing stale decomp workflow clutter.
Kept the PR minimal: one deleted file and no code edits.
The decomp.dev GALE01 report said "No changes", which supports that the cleanup did not affect the built artifact.
decomp_lessons: Temporary target-function lists should be removed after the listed work is complete so future contributors do not chase already-finished functions.
Pure bookkeeping cleanup can be safely isolated in a tiny PR, making binary/no-change validation straightforward.
Checked-off function lists are useful during active matching work but should not be treated as permanent source-of-truth documentation unless intentionally maintained.
naming_conventions: The removed checklist used the project's address-suffixed symbol style for unmatched or decomp-tracked functions, such as grAnime_801C86D4.
The listed symbols used the grAnime_ prefix corresponding to src/melee/gr/granime.c.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: No assembly or matching tactics were shown in this PR; the diff only removed a completed target list.
The only matching-related evidence is indirect: all listed functions were marked [x] before the checklist was deleted.

review_feedback.body: Report for GALE01 (09511e2 - bcc3bf5): No changes
review_feedback.interpretation: Automated validation found no GALE01 binary changes.

follow_up_queries: Find the PRs that matched or completed the grAnime functions listed in the removed target_funcs.txt.
Search for other temporary target_funcs.txt or target-list files that may be stale.
Check whether grAnime_801C86D4 and the related grAnime functions now have stable non-address-based names or remain address-suffixed.
